title: Immersive Minecraft
description: Immersive Minecraft simply overhauls Minecraft's default ambience and makes the game more Immersive. Most mods in the mod pack aim to make the game more relaxing and feel somewhat new.
body:
# Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-Pk1lbuRJ28" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The music in the video is included in the mod pack

</details>



# About The Immersive Minecraft Modpack
The Immersive Minecraft Modpack simply overhauls Minecraft's default ambience and makes it more immersive. Most mods in the mod pack aim to make the game more relaxing and feel some-what new. 

If you enjoy this mod pack, join our discord! Also feel free to leave suggestions in the server!

Expect updates often


# Here's a summarized list of the mods included and links!

**The Immersive Music Mod**: Adds many new songs to the default minecraft soundtrack.
   - [The Immersive Music Mod on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivemusicmod)

1. **Advancement Plaques**: Replaces standard advancement popups with decorative plaques.
   - [Advancement Plaques on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques)

2. **Ambient Sounds**: Adds various ambient sounds to enhance the game atmosphere.
   - [Ambient Sounds on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ambient-sounds)

3. **Better Advancements**: Improves the advancements user interface for a better experience.
   - [Better Advancements on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-advancements)

4. **Better Third Person**: Enhances third-person view with smoother camera movements.
   - [Better Third Person on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-third-person)

5. **Camera Overhaul**: Improves the in-game camera for a better visual experience.
   - [Camera Overhaul on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cameraoverhaul)

6. **Cloth Config API**: Required for various mods to configure settings.
   - [Cloth Config on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)

7. **Collective**: Provides various utilities for other mods.
   - [Collective on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collective)

8. **CreativeCore**: Required library for other mods.
   - [CreativeCore on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creativecore)

9. **Diagonal Fences**: Allows placing fences diagonally.
   - [Diagonal Fences on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/diagonal-fences)

10. **Enhanced Visuals**: Adds visual effects based on player actions and environment.
    - [Enhanced Visuals on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-visuals)

11. **Entity Model Features**: Adds more features and customization options to entities.
    - [Entity Model Features on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

12. **Falling Leaves**: Adds falling leaves from trees for a more dynamic environment.
    - [Falling Leaves on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves)

13. **Iceberg**: Library mod required by many other mods.
    - [Iceberg on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg)

14. **InvMove**: Allows moving and jumping while in inventories.
    - [InvMove on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove)

15. **LazyDFU**: Improves DataFixerUpper performance.
    - [LazyDFU on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lazy-dfu)

16. **Mouse Wheelie**: Enhances inventory management using the mouse wheel.
    - [Mouse Wheelie on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mouse-wheelie)

17. **Player Animation Library**: Adds custom player animations.
    - [Player Animation Library on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-animation-lib)

18. **Presence Footsteps**: Adds realistic footstep sounds.
    - [Presence Footsteps on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps)

19. **Replaned**: Reintroduces various blocks and features removed from vanilla Minecraft.
    - [Replaned on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/replaned)

20. **ShulkerBoxTooltip**: Shows shulker box contents in a tooltip.
    - [ShulkerBoxTooltip on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

21. **Visuality**: Adds particle effects to various in-game actions.
    - [Visuality on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)

22. **Yung's Better Caves, Mineshafts, Strongholds, etc.**: Improves and enhances cave, mineshaft, stronghold, and other underground structures.
    - [YUNG's Better Caves on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-caves)
    - [YUNG's Better Mineshafts on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-mineshafts)
    - [YUNG's Better Strongholds on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-strongholds)
    - [YUNG's Better Dungeons on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-dungeons)


### This list may be inaccurate as there are over 70 mods in this modpack. Sorry in advance..


Thanks :)
